text:
おっつかれさまー！
今回もいい感じだったね！

わたしも頑張らないと、そのうち
相手にしてもらえなくなりそう！

でもまだまだ放さないからねー！
また一緒にやろーね

Welcome back! Nice work out there
again today.

I'd better watch it. Sooner or later I won't
even be able to keep up with you anymore!

I hope you don't think you'll be rid of me that
easy, though.
I'm looking forward to our next stint!
